title: limonium acutifolium subsp. tenuifolium
intro: Limonium acutifolium subsp. tenuifolium, also known as Sea Lavender, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It is a low-growing, shrub-like plant with narrow leaves and purple flowers that are rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oil, which has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sea Lavender include reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and anxiety. Sea Lavender can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oil, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
